headline: May 2026 Dividend Stocks To Enhance Your Portfolio
summary: The United States market has shown impressive growth, rising 2.5% over the last week and 26% over the past year, with earnings projected to increase by 17% annually. In this thriving environment, selecting dividend stocks that offer both stability and potential for income can be a strategic move to enhance your portfolio.

headline: Accenture Expands AI Safety Offering With Powerfleet Partnership In Milan
summary: Accenture (NYSE:ACN) has formed a new partnership with Powerfleet to bring connected safety solutions into its Innovation and Technology Centre in Milan. The collaboration focuses on expanding AI powered safety and digital transformation offerings for enterprise clients across Central Europe. Powerfleet’s intelligent safety technologies will be integrated and showcased within Accenture’s Milan facility for regional clients. This move puts Accenture (NYSE:ACN) more directly into the...

headline: Powerfleet and Accenture Launch Advanced Safety Solutions Partnership in Central Europe
summary: Powerfleet, Inc. (Nasdaq: AIOT), a global leader in the artificial intelligence of things (AIoT) SaaS mobile asset industry, today announced a strategic partnership with Accenture, marking a significant step forward in expanding intelligent safety technologies across Central Europe.
